examples.title: Can You Add Length + Time?
examples.content: No! 5 meters + 3 seconds = ???. Different dimensions can't be added. It's like adding 5 apples + 3 oranges—the result is meaningless.

examples.title: Can You Add Distance + Distance?
examples.content: Yes! 5 meters + 3 meters = 8 meters. Both have dimension [L]. Addition works.

examples.title: Wrong Equation Check
examples.content: s = ut + v. Left: [L]. Right: [L T⁻¹][T] + [L T⁻¹] = [L] + [L T⁻¹]. Can't add [L] + [L T⁻¹]! The equation is WRONG.
